##NAMES=Afghanite
##RRUFFID=R060422
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Na,K)_22_Ca_10_(Si_24_Al_24_)O_96_(SO_4_)_6_Cl_6_
##LOCALITY=Kokscha Valley, Badakshan Province, Afghanistan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Herb Obodda
##DESCRIPTION=Blue hexagonal prism with pyramidal termination
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060422
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Na_19.94_K_2.06_)Ca_10.00_[Si_24.00_Al_24.00_O_96_](S_1.00_O_4_)_6_Cl_6.00_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.765 b: 12.765 c: 21.4205 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 3022.7 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
